name: Full agent-UX review
when_to_use: Audit every agent-facing interaction surface and score each (fan-out)

name: Review machine-readable state
when_to_use: Audit perceivable state/actions/results and human-only affordances and score

name: Review deterministic actions
when_to_use: Audit selector stability and retry-safety and score

name: Review approval and agency
when_to_use: Audit in-path gating of irreversible actions and on-behalf consent and score

name: Review audience conflicts
when_to_use: Audit human-vs-agent trade-offs and dual paths and score
